programs.title: The History of Food
programs.desc: Industrialized and processed food has dominated the last century. Now, the question is, what's next.

programs.title: Eat Like
programs.desc: Can we copy Catherine The Great’s diet? In our new series with @My Name Is Andong, we’re exploring how to eat like different legendary figures from history.

programs.title: Eat Like
programs.desc: In this episode of EAT Like, @MyNameIsAndong explores what wolves eat, and how their eating habits are different than the modern domestic dogs'.

programs.title: Eat Like
programs.desc: In this episode of EAT LIKE, @My Name Is Andong explores what Vikings eat and common misconceptions about them.

programs.title: Bright Now
programs.desc: More than 400 million cups of coffee are consumed in the United States alone each day, making it one of the hottest drinks – even when served cold.

programs.title: Bright Now
programs.desc: Food Anthropologist Dr. Bill Schindler is on an international quest to discover what we should eat. He and his family uncover ancient culinary practices and show how they can bring simplicity and good health to the modern kitchen.
